Lots of native red huckleberry at the campground. Fruits around August.

On the hike to Susan Creek Falls

Native blackberry. Ground cover. Fruits July-August

Native raspberry. Bushy habit. Leaves look kind of like grape leaves. Fruits June. 

Watch out for poison oak - especially near the blackberries.
